overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (The Witcher 3) showing a white-haired character walking along a dirt path at night while holding a torch. The character traverses a rural medieval landscape with wooden fences, passes a wanted poster, and approaches a wooden cart structure under a dark blue night sky with a visible moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rural grassland path at night

events.description: moon becomes visible in the night sky as the character walks forward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path holding a torch, illuminating the immediate surroundings

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the grassland
tall grass covering the open fields on both sides of the path
simple wooden posts marking the edge of the path
flaming torch held by the character casting warm orange light
large pale moon visible against the dark blue night sky
dark silhouette of distant trees on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through open grassland at night, holding a torch that casts flickering orange light on the ground. The moon is visible in the dark blue sky above, and wooden fence posts line the right side of the path while distant trees mark the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path with wooden fence and wanted poster

events.description: wanted poster on wooden post comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path, passing by a wanted poster nailed to a wooden post on the right

entered.detail: paper poster nailed to a wooden post showing a drawn face and text

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the path as the moon becomes obscured by clouds or trees. A wanted poster on a wooden post appears on the right side of the path, briefly illuminated by the torchlight as the character passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path approaching wooden cart and stone structures

events.description: wooden cart with large wheel and stone wall posts appear on the sides of the path

agents.ego_description: walking toward a wooden cart structure, torch illuminating the path and revealing stone walls

entered.detail: large wooden wagon wheel leaning against a cart structure
stone pillars marking an entrance or boundary along the path

segments.scene_description: The path leads toward a more enclosed area with denser trees overhead. A wooden cart with a large wheel becomes visible on the right side of the path, while stone wall posts appear on the left, suggesting the approach to a village or farmstead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt path at night, transitioning from an open grassland into a more enclosed settlement area. It begins with the character walking through wide fields under a visible moon, with a handheld torch casting flickering orange light across the ground and nearby wooden fence posts. As the character advances, the moon becomes obscured by the environment and the camera passes a wanted poster affixed to a wooden post on the right. The scene then shifts as the path leads under a denser canopy of trees, where the open horizon is replaced by stone wall posts on the left. Finally, the movement brings a wooden cart with a large wheel into view, signaling the approach to a farmstead or village.
